title: U Earnings History & Surprises - EPS & Revenue Results
text: Earnings Surprise Analysis: In the last 4 quarters, U has beaten the EPS estimates by 8.8% on average. In the last 4 quarters, U has beaten the revenue estimates by 1.6% on average. Consistent Beat Track Record: Q1 2026: Revenue beat with $508M vs est $500M. Q4 2024: Revenue beat with $457M vs est $433M, with EPS loss smaller than expected. Q3 2024: Revenue beat with $447M vs est $430M, 20.51% earnings surprise. Q2 2024: Revenue beat with $449M vs est $439M, EPS of -$0.32 vs est -$0.42. The track record of beating analyst estimates consistently has contributed to positive investor sentiment. Historical Context: After the turbulent 2023 when the runtime fee controversy significantly impacted sentiment, the company's return to beating estimates in 2024-2025 has been crucial in rebuilding investor confidence. Revenue Trend: Despite YoY declines in 2024, the company managed to beat guidance in the second half of the year, signaling stabilization and recovery. EPS Trend: Moving from substantial losses (-$1.36 in 2023) towards smaller losses has demonstrated improving operational efficiency.
